decisions.title: Catch semantics source of truth
decisions.decision: ADR-003 D4 code sample supersedes design spec summary
decisions.rationale: Normative spec (code sample) takes precedence over informal summary; ensures catch block handles both notLoggedIn and accessDenied

decisions.title: Red flag RF3 resolution
decisions.decision: Include tooltip parameter from design spec
decisions.rationale: Design-spec addition is implementable and improves UX; added R12 risk for tooltip help system

decisions.title: Red flag RF4 resolution
decisions.decision: Include single-account popover height update (320->240) in D3
decisions.rationale: Design-spec addition is required for visual consistency; incorporated into Phase 3 constants

decisions.title: Red flag RF1 resolution
decisions.rationale: Out of scope for ADR-003; tracked as enhancement opportunity, not part of this implementation

keyCorrections: Dependency graph corrected: removed false 1.1→2.1 edge (D1 independent of D2)
Catch semantics corrected: ADR code sample supersedes design spec summary
Test matrix expanded from 28 to 29 scenarios with T29 (interactionNotAllowed)
